recommendation_template: {principal} holds an ADO Basic seat but shows no work-item, code, or pipeline activity in 90 days. Reclaim the seat.
summary: Basic seat with no work-item or repo activity in 90 days.

recommendation_template: {principal}'s only ADO activity in 90 days is reading boards and commenting. Step them down to the free Stakeholder access level.
summary: Basic seat whose only activity is reading boards / commenting.

recommendation_template: The organization owns {purchased_parallel_jobs} Microsoft-hosted parallel jobs but P95 concurrent usage was {p95_concurrent_jobs}. Reduce the purchased count.
summary: Purchased Microsoft-hosted parallel jobs exceed P95 concurrent usage.

recommendation_template: {principal} holds a Basic + Test Plans seat but has not opened or modified a Test Plan in 60 days. Step down to Basic.
summary: Basic+Test Plans seat with no Test Plans activity in 60 days.

recommendation_template: Virtual machine {principal} has averaged {avg_cpu_pct}% CPU and {avg_net_kbps} KB/s network over 14 days. Stop or deallocate the VM, or right-size to a smaller SKU.
summary: VM with <5% CPU and minimal network for 14 days.

recommendation_template: Disk {principal} ({disk_size_gb} GB, {disk_sku}) has been unattached since {last_attached_at}. Delete or snapshot-and-delete.
summary: Managed disk not attached for 7+ days.

recommendation_template: Public IP {principal} is unattached and accruing reservation charges. Release it.
summary: Standard public IP is not associated with any resource.

recommendation_template: {principal} ({current_sku}) shows P95 CPU {p95_cpu_pct}% and P95 memory {p95_mem_pct}%. Resize to {recommended_sku} in the same family.
summary: VM whose P95 CPU and memory both stay below 40% for 14 days.

recommendation_template: Reservation {principal} averaged {utilization_pct}% utilization over 30 days. Exchange or shrink the commitment at next renewal.
summary: Reservation / Savings Plan utilization below 80% for 30 days.

recommendation_template: Workspace {principal} ingested {daily_gb} GB/day on average. Move to commitment tier {recommended_tier} for ~{est_savings_pct}% list-price reduction.
summary: Log Analytics workspace ingest above commitment-tier sweet spot.

recommendation_template: Resource {principal} is tagged env={env_tag} but lives in subscription {subscription_id} ({subscription_offer}). Move the workload to a subscription with the matching offer to avoid mispricing or compliance risk.
summary: Workload tag and subscription offer disagree (prod-in-devtest or vice-versa).

recommendation_template: Scope {principal} shows uncovered on-demand spend of ${cost_without_benefit_usd} over {lookback_period}. Azure's Benefit Recommendations API projects ${net_savings_usd} in savings if you verify the workload is steady-state and not the trailing edge of a one-off project, then consider a {term} Savings Plan commitment with an hourly commit of ${recommended_hourly_commit_usd}.
summary: Scope has uncovered on-demand spend the Benefit Recommendations API would move under a Savings Plan.

recommendation_template: Reservation {principal} is {scope_kind}-scope and averaged {utilization_pct}% utilisation, while sibling subscription {sibling_sub} shows ${sibling_on_demand_spend_usd} of on-demand resource spend over the same window. Verify the sibling's on-demand SKUs are compatible with this reservation's family and region (Azure auto-applies on a best-fit basis), then consider widening the reservation's applied scope so the sibling's workload absorbs the unused capacity.
summary: Under-utilised reservation while a sibling subscription pays on-demand for a likely-compatible workload.

recommendation_template: Reservation {principal} ({term}) expires on {expiry_date} (in {days_until_expiry} days) and is not configured to auto-renew. Verify whether the workload still needs reserved capacity. If yes, consider renewing or exchanging the reservation before the expiry date. If no, plan for the workload to fall back to on-demand pricing on {expiry_date} and capture the projected on-demand cost in your forecast.
summary: Reservation expiring within the near-expiry window with auto-renew not configured.

recommendation_template: Reservation {principal} is scoped to {owner_subs} while subscriptions {sibling_subs} carry ${non_owner_usd}/mo of on-demand spend on potentially compatible workloads. Consider widening the reservation's applied scope (Single → Shared or Management Group) so the sibling workloads can absorb unused reserved capacity, or verify the narrow scope is intentional (e.g., chargeback isolation).
summary: Single-scope reservation while sibling subscriptions carry significant on-demand spend for likely-compatible workloads.

recommendation_template: VM {principal} ({sku}, {location}) has os_type=Windows but license_type={license_type}. Consider enabling Azure Hybrid Benefit (Windows_Server) to reduce the Windows Server licence cost component. Verify that the organisation holds sufficient Windows Server SA or subscription licences before toggling.
summary: Windows VM running pay-as-you-go without Azure Hybrid Benefit applied. Enabling AHB can reduce Windows Server licence costs on eligible VMs.

recommendation_template: {principal} has had no commits, reviews, issue activity, or sign-ins in 90 days. Reclaim the {current_sku} seat.
summary: Enterprise / Business seat with no activity in 90 days.

recommendation_template: {principal} holds a Copilot seat but has accepted zero suggestions in 30 days. Reassign or remove the seat.
summary: Copilot Business / Enterprise seat with no acceptances in 30 days.

recommendation_template: GHAS is enabled on {ghas_repo_count} repositories with {active_committers} unique committers in the last 90 days, but only {actively_scanned} repos have produced an alert. Disable GHAS on inactive repos to reduce billable committers.
summary: Advanced Security committer count exceeds active-scanning repos.

recommendation_template: The org consumed {used_minutes} runner-minutes in the last billing period against {included_minutes} included minutes. {tier_action_recommendation}
summary: Runner-minute spend is materially over or under the current SKU's included quota.

recommendation_template: Remove the {current_sku} assignment from {principal} or step down to a lower-cost SKU. No covered service has recorded activity in the last 30 days.
summary: Assigned SKU shows no service-plan activity in 30 days.

recommendation_template: {principal} is classified as persona '{persona}'. Their current SKU {current_sku} provides features beyond what this persona requires. Consider {recommended_sku}.
summary: Assigned SKU exceeds the features required by the user's persona.

recommendation_template: {principal} has {current_sku}, which already covers the capabilities of {duplicate_sku}. Remove {duplicate_sku}.
summary: User holds both a bundle SKU and a child SKU it already includes.

recommendation_template: {principal} (accountEnabled = false) still has {current_sku} assigned. Reclaim the license.
summary: Disabled account still carries paid licenses.

recommendation_template: Shared mailbox {principal} ({mailbox_size_gb} GB) does not need a paid Exchange license below the 50 GB threshold. Remove {current_sku}.
summary: Shared mailbox under 50 GB has a paid user license.

recommendation_template: Guest user {principal} has {current_sku} assigned. Guests should rely on the host tenant's resources; remove the assignment unless explicitly justified.
summary: Entra B2B guest carries an interactive M365 license.

recommendation_template: {principal} has Copilot for M365 assigned but no Copilot interactions in the last 60 days. Reassign the seat.
summary: Copilot for M365 add-on with no Copilot activity in 60 days.

recommendation_template: {principal} is on E5 but none of the E5-exclusive capabilities (Defender for O365 P2, Purview DLP/IP, Entra P2 risk policies) have been exercised in 90 days. Consider stepping down to E3 plus targeted add-ons.
summary: E5 user shows no Defender / Purview / Entra-P2 signal in 90 days.
